tests.description: ATDD API RED tests for webhook signature verification, deterministic context routing, canonical identity extraction, and mapping-miss refusals
acceptance_criteria_covered: Only valid signed webhook requests are processed; unsigned/invalid requests fail closed with no domain side effects
Accepted webhook requests resolve deterministic tenant and orgUnit context before downstream handling
Provider-specific identifier aliases normalize into canonical replay-safe identity fields
Unresolved mappings are refused deterministically with auditable metadata and no thread/message/voicemail artifacts

summary: Generated 4 FAILING API tests for story e-1 webhook ingress and deterministic context routing
